tags.network:note: Tokyo Metro commuter service through third railways lines. Trains cross Tokyo metropolitan area without having to change trains. In japanese is called 直通運転 (direct operation).
tags.note: Line don't stop at Sakuradai station, because the underground section haven't a platform.
tags.start_date:note: Lines opened in 1994. "Double Route" service opened in 2010.

tags.description: Direct commuter service from Shinjuku to Karakida stations. also operates local trains and special schedules with Rapid Express, Commuter Express and SemiExpress.
tags.name: 小田急通勤急行
tags.note:interval: See https://www.odakyu.jp/station/karakida/timetable_up_weekday.pdf and https://www.tokyometro.jp/station/nogizaka/timetable/chiyoda/a/index_print.html. West section has interval of 7-20 minutes (without Tokyo Metro direct train).
